user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Fabrikam Residences. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 11:25 EST
Subject: Re: Re: partner engagement Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-25 11:06 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 16:59 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Fabrikam Residences
Date: 2024-02-18
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Kevin (Fabrikam Residences)

[00:02:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:06:00] Kevin (Fabrikam Residences): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:09:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:14:00] Kevin (Fabrikam Residences): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:22:00] Kevin (Fabrikam Residences): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.
